film.title: Khosla Ka Ghosla!
film.overview: Kamal Khosla's land is grabbed by a land shark named Khurana. In a bid to retrieve their land, Khosla's elder son hatches a clever plan to con the crook and enlists the help of his friends and his dysfunctional family.

dialogues.dialogue: What is this you are doing? What am I doing? I am trying to have a drink with my young son. But he is feeling ashamed to drink with me, don't I understand? You go inside. - He won't go. I need to talk with him. What is there to talk? - There are 100 things.
I will tell you one thing, uncle. Your son is at least sitting with you. My son feels ashamed to sit with me. We have given birth to you; we have brought you up. Nursed you when you were sick.
We have given birth to you; we have brought you up. Nursed you when you were sick. And you feel ashamed to sit with your father? Bloody snakes! Khosla sir, you and me will talk, okay?
